services.title: Web Platform
services.description: Modern web platforms built on Next.js — from marketing sites to content systems and commerce.

services.title: Design Engineering
services.description: High-fidelity frontend implementation from design — component systems, interaction, and production-ready UI.

services.title: Embedded (Principal IC)
services.description: I join your team as a principal-level IC — embedded in your sprints, shipping alongside your engineers. Best for teams that need senior frontend leadership and hands-on product work where design quality and engineering rigor need to coexist.
deliverables: Embedded in your workflow, tools, and cadence
Hands-on product development and code review
Fractional or full-time, weekly or monthly

services.title: AI Integration
services.description: Practical AI features for products and internal tools — scoped to real use cases.

services.title: Technical Advisory
services.description: Short-term consulting on architecture, frontend systems, or product direction.

process: you tell me what you need. i'll ask the right questions.
i scope it and quote it. fixed price, clear deliverable. no hourly billing, no surprises.
i build it. fast, communicative, on deadline. full visibility the whole way.
you ship it. clean code, documentation, everything your team needs to take it forward.
optionally, i stick around. retainer and maintenance arrangements available for ongoing work.
